name: VIVA Finance, Inc.
description_short: VIVA Finance offers affordable fixed-rate personal loans from $300 to $10,000 at 11.99%–35.99% APR. Approvals based on employment history, not just credit score. BBB A+ rated, founded 2019.
description_long:
VIVA Finance, Inc. is a direct personal loan lender founded in 2019 and headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. The company specializes in affordable fixed-rate installment loans for borrowers who may not qualify with traditional lenders, approving applicants based on employment history rather than credit score alone.

VIVA Finance offers loans ranging from $300 to $10,000 with APRs between 11.99% and 35.99% — significantly lower than payday loan alternatives that can exceed 400% APR. Loan terms range from 5 months to 2 years, with no prepayment penalties, allowing borrowers to pay off their balance early without extra fees. The application process is streamlined and digital, with funding often available within one business day.

The company serves borrowers seeking debt consolidation, credit card refinancing, and funds for unexpected expenses. VIVA Finance reports payments to credit bureaus, which means on-time payments can help borrowers build or rebuild their credit over time.

With a 4.9/5.0 rating across 3,657 Google reviews and 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot from over 1,000 reviews, VIVA Finance has built strong customer satisfaction. The company holds a BBB A+ rating and has been BBB-accredited since 2021. CEO Jack Markwalter founded the company in April 2019 with a focus on making personal loans accessible to underserved borrowers.

Customer service is available Monday through Thursday 8 AM to 8 PM and Friday 8 AM to 5 PM. Borrowers can apply online or call directly to discuss their options.

pricing.guarantee_details: No prepayment penalties. Fixed-rate loans with transparent terms disclosed before commitment.

pros: Employment-based approval — not just credit score, giving access to borrowers traditional banks reject
Competitive APR range (11.99%–35.99%) — far below payday loan rates
No prepayment penalties — pay off early without extra fees
Fast funding — often within one business day after approval
Excellent customer satisfaction — 4.9/5 Google (3,657 reviews), 4.5/5 Trustpilot (1,000+ reviews)
BBB A+ rated and accredited since 2021
Reports to credit bureaus — on-time payments help build credit
cons: Maximum loan amount of $10,000 may not cover larger expenses
APR can reach 35.99% for higher-risk borrowers
Limited to personal loans — no credit cards, mortgages, or auto loans
best_for: Borrowers with bad or limited credit who have stable employment
Employees with 1+ year at their current job seeking personal loans
People who need up to $10,000 with fixed monthly payments
Borrowers looking to consolidate debt or refinance credit card balances
Anyone who wants approval based on employment history, not just credit score
diagnosis: A direct personal loan lender offering fixed-rate installment loans from $300 to $10,000 at 11.99%–35.99% APR. Stands out for employment-based approvals, no prepayment penalties, and same-day funding. Exceptional customer reviews (4.9/5 Google, 3,657 reviews) and BBB A+ rating. A strong choice for borrowers with limited credit who have stable jobs.

products_services.name: Personal Installment Loan
products_services.description: Fixed-rate personal loans from $300 to $10,000 with terms of 5 months to 2 years. No prepayment penalties.

products_services.name: Debt Consolidation Loan
products_services.description: Combine multiple debts into a single fixed monthly payment at a potentially lower rate than credit cards or payday loans.

products_services.name: Credit Card Refinancing
products_services.description: Replace high-interest credit card debt with a fixed-rate personal loan to reduce total interest paid.

products_services.name: Emergency Expense Loan
products_services.description: Quick-access personal loans for unexpected expenses with funding often available within one business day.

services: Credit bureau reporting for credit building
typical_results_timeline: Online application takes minutes. Approval decisions are typically same-day, with funding often deposited within one business day.
address: 112 Krog St NE Suite D145, Atlanta, GA 30307
